title: Chicken
description: this mod adds chickens and stuff
body:
![chicken blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e68cda2497f0041f78f87be619bf491e560ebec9.png)

made with MCreator

Chicken

# mod additions:
- block of chicken
- heavy block of chicken
- chicken stairs
- chicken slabs
- chicken wood
- chicken fluid
- chicken doors
- a chicken dimension
- crafting recipes
- a chicken boss
- and more!

# how to go to the chicken dimension
1. get atleast 10 blocks of chicken
2. get a chickinator
3. build a nether portal frame using the blocks of chicken
4. light the portal
5. go into the portal
6. and now you're in the chicken dimension :D

i will add more later
